content.full_text:
April 25, 1990

Ms. Jeanne Pritchard  
Division Chief, Technical Assistance and Analysis Division  
Fair Political Practices Commission  
428 J Street, Suite 800  
Sacramento, California 95814

Dear Ms. Pritchard:

This letter requests informal assistance under Government Code, Section 83114(b). I am requesting confirmation of telephone advice as a person with a duty to advise other persons relating to their duties under the Political Reform Act (the "Act"). (2 California Code of Regulations, Section 18329(c)(1)).

On April 18, 1990, we were advised by Lynda Cassady that a candidate who receives a contribution of less than $100 from an intermediary is not required to itemize such contribution or the intermediary on his or her campaign statement.

Please feel free to contact us if you have any questions.

Sincerely,

Cary Davidson

CD:fm

CD00419.1
